response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for 'Rivals and Equals'. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was fully utilized for lyrics; manual transcription and translation were applied to prominent visual text during the intro and song performance. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal onset; visual text durations were timed to on-screen visibility. Aggressive truncation was applied during rapid-fire verses to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Like primal ways of a warrior
subtitles.english: Like primal ways of a warrior

subtitles.original: Is it glory you're after, like me?
subtitles.english: Is it glory you're after, like me?

subtitles.original: Taking aim but it doesn't make a difference at all
subtitles.english: Taking aim but it doesn't make a difference at all

subtitles.original: I got a million different enemies I cannot recall
subtitles.english: I got a million different enemies I cannot recall

subtitles.original: You're rocking up to a battle when you know that you'll fall
subtitles.english: You're rocking up to a battle when you know that you'll fall

subtitles.original: Hidden motivation, watch it all burn
subtitles.english: Hidden motivation, watch it all burn

subtitles.original: Now would I lie to you?
subtitles.english: Now would I lie to you?

subtitles.original: When the world caves under my pressure
subtitles.english: When the world caves under my pressure

subtitles.original: There'll be no one to save
subtitles.english: There'll be no one to save

subtitles.original: Where is your pride, your human will to survive?
subtitles.english: Where is your pride, your human will to survive?

subtitles.original: Cuz of you, I live this way
